name: Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. engages in the textile, agriculture, and tourism businesses in Turkey. The company offers cotton, polyester-viscose, and elastane yarns. It is also involved in the cotton unseed trading; and cotton and corn farming activities; and growing citrus and olive trees. Bilici Yatirim Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. was founded in 1950 and is based in Adana, Turkey.
